meaning: part per million 百万分之...;papers per minut,每一分钟内可以打印的页数
examples: Are you ready for a PPM implementation?
Choosing the right software for PPM processes.
When measurements of carbon dioxide were first taken in 1958, it measured 315 ppm.
Back then, it took 7, 000 years for carbon dioxide to reach 80 ppm, Tans said.
So for every part per million (ppm) increase, a little less warming is generated.
